component.name: Scanline
component.summary: An unofficial native client for Plex

description.p: Scanline lets you browse your Plex media libraries, search across servers, and play content natively in a GTK4 / Adwaita interface.

ul.li: Multi-server support
Full-text search
Library browsing
Video playback
MPRIS integration
Scrobbling to ListenBrainz

description.p: Requires a Plex account and access to a Plex server.

screenshot.caption: Scanline displaying the public, unauthenticated home page
Scanline showing the search page, while displaying the lyrics of the current song

ul.li: Add simple sorting options to search
Add cast page
Wire-up the director and writer links
Implement genre pages
Fix windowed player controller cleanup (#52)
Add WindowHandle to make windowed player draggable
Refresh page after player close
Fix background gradient to go all the way down
Make controls visible on light mode
Add Playback Progress tracking
Update to Schwifty 1.4.0 version
Add a release workflow
Add scripts for Flatpak and Nix updates
Properly handle season on the Home page
Allow going back to TV Show from Episodes/Seasons
Allow going to season from the episode Page
Add windowed player support
Add season progress to Show page
Add episode progress to the season page
Add Play/Continue button to show page
Add Play/Continue button to season page
Fix cast going oval on wide screens
Update artifact steps to latest available versions
Allow search page/bar to be closed
Use /hubs/promoted for the Home page to mirror Plex App
Prevent player from cutting off content
Make player no longer half transparent
Fix "Continue" button
Update Schwifty to latest version
Add Playback Progress tracking
Update to Schwifty 1.4.0 version
Add a release workflow
Add scripts for Flatpak and Nix updates
Fix cast going oval on wide screens
Update artifact steps to latest available versions
Update Schwifty to latest version
